programme.desc: Fred and Rose West were convicted of murdering 12 young women. Now, several pieces of strong new evidence have been discovered, indicating there may be many more than these known victims.

programme.title: Murdered at First Sight
programme.desc: Most killers know their victims, Murdered At First Sight investigates the alarming rise in "Stranger Murders" and the challenges faced by the police in tracking down the suspect of an entirely random homicide.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Following police detectives around the clock, each investigation plays out against the time pressure of only being able to hold a suspect for 24 hours.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Following police detectives around the clock, each investigation plays out against the time pressure of only being able to hold a suspect for 24 hours.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful 23-year-old girl was driving home after a rock concert when her tyre blew out. Investigators found her car, but no trace of her. At first there were hundreds of leads, but after three years, the trail turned cold. Police got a break when someone called to report a suspicious truck in a neighbour's driveway; something inside that truck was plugged into an electrical outlet, allowing the device to run 24 hours-a-day, 365-days-a-year. Suddenly, the cold trail turned even colder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. She was a promising young dancer, whose ability landed her a spot in Houston's prestigious High School for Performing Arts. Unfortunately, while there, Tracy Jo became involved with the wrong crowd, and began experimenting with drugs. When she disappeared without a trace, her family immediately suspected her new friends, some of whom were members of the Aryian Brotherhood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It looked like 62-year-old Phillip Rouss, Jr had it all: family, friends, and a new business which was the culmination of a lifelong dream. Then his health began to deteriorate. Doctors couldn't pinpoint the cause of the illness and Phil began to suspect his condition was no accident. Toxicologists and investigators identified the real problem just in time to save Phil's life.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When six-year-old Michelle Door disappeared without a trace, her father, Carl, became the prime suspect. Carl failed a polygraph test, and even confessed to the murder of his daughter. But the confession was rooted in exhaustion, guilt, and mental illness, and was later discounted. Years later, police learned that a man who had been convicted of another murder lived just two doors away from Michelle at the time of her disappearance. This discovery, and tiny drops of blood shed a decade earlier, enabled police to solve the crime.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Following police detectives around the clock, each investigation plays out against the time pressure of only being able to hold a suspect for 24 hours.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Following police detectives around the clock, each investigation plays out against the time pressure of only being able to hold a suspect for 24 hours.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: Lieutenant Joe Kenda and his Colorado Springs crime-fighting team have solved an unprecedented 387 homicide investigations, resulting in a 92% solve rate. Each episode of Homicide Hunter will use Kenda's first person narrative along with dramatic re-creations to retell the stories of Kenda's most disturbing and challenging murder cases. Homicide Hunters takes viewers behind the scenes with one of the world's best homicide detectives to learn how murders are solved. Neighbours are aghast when beloved nurse Ernestine Addison and her teenage son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. Evidence at the scene suggests a crime of passion, and a young tipster points Lt. Joe Kenda towards a large shadowy figure spotted fleeing the scene. Kenda begins to piece together clues about the mystery man's identity, and initiates a city-wide manhunt to track him down. But the case heats up when he receives word that the killer's murderous rampage isn't over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: Lieutenant Joe Kenda and his Colorado Springs crime-fighting team have solved an unprecedented 387 homicide investigations, resulting in a 92% solve rate. Each episode of Homicide Hunter will use Kenda's first person narrative along with dramatic re-creations to retell the stories of Kenda's most disturbing and challenging murder cases. programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: Lieutenant Joe Kenda and his Colorado Springs crime-fighting team have solved an unprecedented 387 homicide investigations, resulting in a 92 percent solve rate. Each episode of Homicide Hunter will use Kenda's first person narrative along with dramatic re-creations to retell the stories of Kenda's most disturbing and challenging murder cases. Homicide Hunters takes viewers behind the scenes with one of the world's best homicide detectives to learn how murders are solved. A park ranger discovers the dead body of amateur boxer Cory Edge floating in a shallow creek, clothed in nothing but underwear. The teen had been stabbed in the chest and dumped at the scene, and much of the blood evidence had washed away with the current. But when Lt. Joe Kenda learns the young student had recently enlisted into the criminal underworld to fund his education, he must sort through a rogue's gallery of shady associates and rivals to learn the truth. The case slows to a standstill, before Kenda realises the real killers have been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: Lieutenant Joe Kenda and his Colorado Springs crime-fighting team have solved an unprecedented 387 homicide investigations, resulting in a 92% solve rate. programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: A 72-year-old man is found stabbed to death in a junkyard, wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures; when investigators discover a trail of purchases made with the victim's credit card, they hope it will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When a Vietnam War veteran reportedly takes his own life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team are called in to investigate. Just as detectives begin to suspect they're looking at a staged scene, they're forced to drop everything and flee - the house is booby-trapped. Then, a group of teenagers discover a shallow, unmarked grave on the outskirts of town. Knowing this is the perfect place to dump a body, Kenda and his detectives begin chasing down missing persons reports. With nothing but a pile of human bones to go on, even the Coroner's Office is nearly stumped.

programme.title: I Met My Murderer Online
programme.desc: Each episode tells the story of how an online connection led to murder. Whether it's through online dating, money-making schemes, or the chance to cheat every story is different with a tragic end.

programme.title: I Met My Murderer Online
programme.desc: Each episode tells the story of how an online connection led to murder. Whether it's through online dating, money-making schemes, or the chance to cheat every story is different with a tragic end.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: The team investigates the 1990 brutal murder of an 80-year-old grandmother. Was it a random attack or did someone close to her commit the horrific crime?

programme.title: Australian Crime Stories
programme.desc: This series blows the lid off Australia's criminal underworld and reveals the real story behind what made and shaped the most notorious figures in Australian criminal history.

programme.title: Homicide With Ron Iddles
programme.desc: One of Australia's greatest detectives reveals the untold stories of his most challenging cases. This series takes you behind the news headlines, on a minute-by-minute journey with Ron Iddles.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Delves into the gripping real-life stories of the world's most terrifying and prolific killers. From Fred and Rose West to Ed Gein (The Clown Killer) and The Milwaukee Cannibal. Utilizing a combination of compelling interviews, narration, archive footage and stylized reconstruction, each episode focuses on one notorious killer and features authentic first-hand accounts of their behaviour, from detectives who ran the case, journalists who reported on the stories, relatives - and at times, survivors - alongside series experts who provide analysis. These criminologists, crime journalists and psychologists examine how the infamous killers made headlines both nationally and internationally and why they still continue to evoke fear and fascination in the public eye.

programme.desc: Eight teams compete in the Los Angeles heat. Things are even tougher when special guest challenges them all to a head-to-head competition.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race
programme.desc: In Venice Beach, CA, Chef Antonia Lofaso challenges the trucks to craft a signature dish. Plus, Tyler Florence makes the trucks swap teammates.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car. Chad presses hard to get his creation ready for its dramatic reveal.

programme.title: Runs Good
programme.desc: Dan, Shea and Aaron buy a Fox-body Mustang drag project that was halfway through a turbocharged LS heart transplant.

programme.title: Custom Carolina
programme.desc: Tommy and the crew finish a one-of-a-kind '54 Chevy Corvette build before a big local car show.

programme.title: Mud Madness
programme.sub-title: All's Fair In Mud And War
programme.desc: At Carter Off-Road Park, Bryce looks to defend his title against his nemesis, Josh. But things quickly get out of hand, ending with a broken rig and a bruised ego.

programme.title: Fastest Cars In The Dirty S
programme.desc: The freshly painted Vega is ready for testing. But the team need to get it down the track under five seconds to beat James Rowlette's Mustang.

programme.title: Misfit Garage
programme.desc: The Fired Up Garage guys buy their next build: a '69 Plymouth Satellite to turn it into a racer with a 750-hp big block 440 engine.

programme.title: Last Chance Garage
programme.desc: Tony takes on a botched International Scout nightmare with wiring issues. A Camaro, stored but damaged by a falling tree, needs some urgent attention.

programme.desc: A couple's RV is revamped into a mobile sportsman's lodge with leather captain's chairs, a custom fish cleaning station and tackle drawer, turning it into a cabin on wheels.

programme.title: RV Kings

programme.title: Airplane Repo

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays looks back at the aftermath of the 1980 Purcell case in West Finger, AR, including possible evidence left behind at the Devil's Den, an outdoor hangout for local kids. As attention focuses on two conspicuous suspects; Brett Woodard, a solitary vet and trash collector, and Ted LaGrange, an ex-con with a penchant for children, the parents of the missing kids, Tom and Lucy Purcell, receive a cryptic note from an anonymous source.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays recalls his early romance with Amelia, as well as some cracks in their relationship that surfaced after they married and had children. Ten years after the Purcell crimes took place, new evidence emerges, giving Hays a second chance to vindicate himself and the investigation.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays and West see a possible connection between the local church and the Purcell crimes. As the detectives search for one suspect and round up another one for interrogation, Woodard finds himself targeted by a vigilante group.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Wayne finds himself in a no-win situation as new clues emerge in the Purcell case. Roland wrestles with how to keep evidence secure as lawyers demand a new investigation. Amelia finds her relationship with Wayne imperiled by her writing aspirations and his jealousy.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Wayne and Roland revisit discrepancies in the Purcell case that have been hidden or forgotten over the years. Among those being reevaluated is Tom Purcell, as well as Lucy Purcell's cousin Dan O'Brien. The glitter of Amelia's book release is tarnished by a voice from the past.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Following up on new leads, Wayne and Roland track down a man who left the police force in the midst of the Purcell investigation. Meanwhile, Amelia visits Lucy Purcell's best friend in hopes of gaining insights into the whereabouts of the mysterious one-eyed man.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Wayne struggles to hold on to his memories, and his grip on reality, as the truth behind the Purcell case is finally revealed.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In Ennis, Alaska, the men who operate a research station vanish. To solve the case, Detectives Danvers and Navarro must confront the darkness themselves, and dig into the haunted truths that lie buried.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence, Captain Connelly threatens to move the case to Anchorage.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: When Julia's mental health struggles resurface, Navarro brings her to a local facility, promising this time will be better.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Prior digs into the links between Tsalal and mining company Silver Sky, Navarro rescues Leah from a local protest that has turned violent.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: April 26, 1986, Ukrainian SSR. Plant workers and firefighters put their lives on the line to control a catastrophic explosion at a Soviet nuclear power plant.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: With untold millions at risk after the Chernobyl explosion, nuclear physicist Ulana Khomyuk makes a desperate attempt to reach Valery Legasov, a leading Soviet nuclear physicist, and warn him about the threat of second explosion that could devastate the continent.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Lyudmilla Ignatenko, a Pripyat resident, ignores warnings about her firefighter husband's contamination; Valery Legasov lays out a decontamination plan, complete with human risks.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov and Soviet Deputy Prime Minister Boris Shcherbina consider using lunar rovers to remove radioactive debris, while Ulana Khomyuk faces government hurdles in determining the truth about the cause of the explosion.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov, Boris Shcherbina and Ulana Khomyuk risk their lives and reputations to expose the truth about Chernobyl.
